snp5.16:1.1: Twice now, Sakyan, I’ve asked you,
snp5.16:1.3: but you, One with Eyes, haven’t answered me.
snp5.16:1.5:
the divine seer answers”:
So I have heard.
snp5.16:2.2: the Brahmā world with its devas:
snp5.16:2.3: I don’t know how they’re viewed
snp5.16:3.1: So to the one who has seen to the far extreme,
snp5.16:3.2: I’ve come with a desire for a question:
snp5.16:3.3: One who regards the world in what way
snp5.16:3.4:
isn’t seen by Death’s King?
The Buddha:
Always mindful, Mogharāja,
snp5.16:4.3: having removed any view in terms of self.
snp5.16:4.4: This way one is above & beyond death.
snp5.16:4.5: One who regards the world in this way
